__comment_confidence: confidence fields below are managed by recordStrategyPerformance() — do not edit manually

strategies.name: Evil Panda
strategies.description: Single-side SOL liquidity provision for bullish trends. Deploys full capital range from current price to -94% below, capturing upside fee generation.

exit.takeProfit: Trailing/TP thresholds met while preserving LP fee edge
exit.stopLoss: Drawdown/OOR emergency guard only (not supertrend flip kill-switch)

strategies.name: Deep Fishing
strategies.description: Ultra-deep one-sided SOL bid zone (-86% to -94% below price). Extreme value hunting for crash scenarios with minimal capital deployment.

entry.confirmation: 15m candle close above Supertrend, volume confirms conviction

exit.takeProfit: Price crashes into zone OR 4-6 hours elapsed
exit.stopLoss: Drawdown/OOR emergency guard with deep-range tolerance

strategies.name: Sideways Yield
strategies.description: Balanced dual-side LP concentrated near current price for sideways/ranging markets. Symmetric fee capture in chop zones.

entry.signal: Price in middle of 24h range, ATR < 5%

strategies.name: Bear Defense Idle
strategies.description: No deployment — hold USDC/SOL reserves during bearish regimes. Wait for trend reversal and regime confirmation.
